feedback.text: Greetings to which I will read. Today I was giving my feedback on two recent topics, payment processors and censorship. I am quite concerned that here a couple of weeks ago it seems that a kind of monopoly companies have decided that they can destroy a large number of creators’ lives, leading to the cancellation of their work at risk from the platforms that publish the works of losing the opportunity to process payments with these companies, which are mainly Visa and Mastercard, but also appear to be happening with others such as PayPal. This work is perfectly legal and correctly assessed by the PEGI system; the refusal by these payment processing services seems to me to be an outright one and taking into account the monopoly they have, in particular Visa and Mastercard (processing much more than half of the world’s transactions) and as their refusal to offer services can ruin hundreds of people in less than 1 day, I do not just want this situation to change, I believe that basic means should be turned out that they should not be able to refuse to do such transactions OR if they are created with the right to give them gallit and refuse to plead because a selective group does not like the freedom of expression and that they are excused as such transactions would have an adverse effect on them, which would then be able to report them illegally. All of this, without mentioning as it was a few months ago, has been attacking several industries, pages and other elements related to the overall animation, which seems to be the main topic that these people would like to mention together with video games. Finally comment that I am closely following the totalitarian drift followed by the United Kingdom and other places that have joined fashion, as well as the rumours that have been listening to things coming from Europe on the same subject; I am totally against this and I therefore hope that these totalitarian derivates such as reading our personal messages without our consent and collecting our private data when visiting websites with the excuse of protecting children as if there were no longer thousands of systems designed for this purpose did not exist. I hope you don’t mean here.
